content.claim: Hungary's secondary school network comprises 880 schools designed to ensure access within one hour by public transport, but the 6- and 8-year gimnázium tracks are geographically concentrated in Budapest and a few regional centers rather than evenly distributed across settlements.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: Travel-time verification ('under one hour') is a stated aim, not verified empirical data specific to 6-/8-year track users
Geographic concentration claim based on directory ranking data (top-10 schools), not complete network inventory
Rural gimnázium representation in top rankings does not quantify actual capacity or applicant pools by settlement type
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
